title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to a potential launch
message_html: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to a potential launch ...
snippet: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.
